title: × elyhordeum pavlovii
side_effects: × elyhordeum pavlovii can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, increased heart rate, and respiratory distress. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also cause damage to the liver and kidneys, leading to serious health complications. Additionally, improper use of this plant has been linked to cases of hallucinations, confusion, and altered mental states. In extreme cases, it can even cause coma or death if ingested in large quantities or used in conjunction with other toxic substances.
